parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ phone: $json.phone, name: $json.name || null, last_message_id: $json.message_id, last_customer_message_at: new Date().toISOString(), reengage_done: false, opt_out: false }) }}

parameters.text: =O cliente {{ $json.name || '' }} parou de responder. Reabra a conversa em UMA mensagem curta e natural, retomando de onde paramos.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $json.phone, text: $json.text, delay: Math.min(6000, Math.max(1500, ($json.text || '').length * 45)), presence: "composing" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ reengage_done: true, last_ai_message_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
